revision.text:
{{navbox |name = Shaktism |title = [[Shaktism]] |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |bodyclass = hlist |image = [[File:Debi Durga Sculpture by Sandalwood Murshidabad WB 30 01 2018.jpg|80px|]] |basestyle = background:#FFC569;
| above = * [[History of Shaktism|History]]
|group1 = [[Devi]] |list1 = * [[Mahadevi]] * [[Saraswati]] * [[Lakshmi]] * [[Parvati]] * [[Sati (Hindu goddess)|Sati]] * [[Shakti]] * [[Durga]] ** [[Navadurga]] * [[Mahakali]] * [[Bhadrakali]] * [[Radha]] * [[Sita]] * ''[[:Category:Hindu goddesses|More]]''
|group2 = [[Matrikas]] |list2 = * [[Brahmani]] * [[Maheshvari]] * [[Kaumari]] * [[Vaishnavi (Matrika goddess)|Vaishnavi]] * [[Varahi]] * [[Indrani (Matrika)|Indrani]] * [[Chamunda]]
|group3 = [[Mahavidya]] |list3 = * [[Kali]] * [[Tara (Mahavidya)|Tara]] * [[Tripura Sundari]] * [[Bhuvaneshvari]] * [[Bhairavi]] * [[Chhinnamasta]] * [[Dhumavati]] * [[Bagalamukhi]] * [[Matangi]] * [[Kamalatmika]]
|group4 = [[Navadurga]] |list4 = * [[Shailaputri]] * [[Brahmacharini]] * [[Chandraghanta]] * [[Kushmanda]] * [[Skandamata]] * [[Katyayani]] * [[Kalaratri]] * [[Mahagauri]] * [[Siddhidhatri]]
|group5 = [[Shakta pithas]] |list5 = * [[Vimala Temple|Bimala]] * [[Kalighat Kali Temple|Kalighat]] * [[Kamakhya Temple|Kamakhya]] * [[Taratarini Temple|Taratarini]] * [[Tulja Bhavani Temple|Tulja Bhavani]] * [[Mahalakshmi Temple, Kolhapur|Mahalakshmi]] * ''[[:Category:Shakta pithas|More...]]''
|group6 = [[Hindu texts|Texts]] |list6 = * [[Devi Mahatmya]] * [[Devi-Bhagavata Purana]] * [[Kalika Purana]] * [[Shakta Upanishads]] **[[Sita Upanishad]] **[[Tripuratapini Upanishad]] **[[Devi Upanishad]] **[[Tripura Upanishad]] **[[Bhavana Upanishad]] **[[Saubhagyalakshmi Upanishad]] **[[Sarasvati-rahasya Upanishad]]
|group7 = Regional variations |list7 = * [[Caribbean Shaktism]]
|below = * [[Hinduism]] * [[Tantra]] }}<noinclude> {{doc|content= {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Hindu denomination navigational boxes|Shaktism]] }} </noinclude>

{{navbox |name = Shaktism |title = [[Shaktism]] |state = {{{state|autocollapse}}} |bodyclass = hlist |image = [[File:Debi Durga Sculpture by Sandalwood Murshidabad WB 30 01 2018.jpg|80px|]] |basestyle = background:#FFC569;
| above = * [[:en:History of Shaktism|History]]
|group1 = [[:en:Devi|Devi]] |list1 = * [[:en:Mahadevi|Mahadevi]] * [[Saraswati]] * [[:en:Lakshmi|Lakshmi]] * [[Parvati]] * [[Sati (Hindu goddess)|Sati]] * [[Shakti]] * [[:en:Durga|Durga]] ** [[Navadurga]] * [[Mahakali]] * [[:en:Bhadrakali|Bhadrakali]] * [[Radha]] * [[Sita]] * ''[[:Category:Hindu goddesses|More]]''
|group2 = [[Matrikas]] |list2 = * [[:en:Brahmani|Brahmani]] * [[Maheshvari]] * [[:en:Kaumari|Kaumari]] * [[Vaishnavi (Matrika goddess)|Vaishnavi]] * [[Varahi]] * [[:en:Indrani (Matrika)|Indrani]] * [[:en:Chamunda|Chamunda]]
|group3 = [[Mahavidya]] |list3 = * [[:en:Kali|Kali]] * [[Tara (Mahavidya)|Tara]] * [[Tripura Sundari]] * [[:en:Bhuvaneshvari|Bhuvaneshvari]] * [[:en:Bhairavi|Bhairavi]] * [[:en:Chhinnamasta|Chhinnamasta]] * [[:en:Dhumavati|Dhumavati]] * [[:en:Bagalamukhi|Bagalamukhi]] * [[Matangi]] * [[:en:Kamalatmika|Kamalatmika]]
|group4 = [[Navadurga]] |list4 = * [[Shailaputri]] * [[:en:Brahmacharini|Brahmacharini]] * [[:en:Chandraghanta|Chandraghanta]] * [[:en:Kushmanda|Kushmanda]] * [[Skandamata]] * [[:en:Katyayani|Katyayani]] * [[:en:Kalaratri|Kalaratri]] * [[:en:Mahagauri|Mahagauri]] * [[Siddhidhatri]]
|group5 = [[Shakta pithas]] |list5 = * [[Vimala Temple|Bimala]] * [[:en:Kalighat Kali Temple|Kalighat]] * [[:en:Kamakhya Temple|Kamakhya]] * [[Taratarini Temple|Taratarini]] * [[Tulja Bhavani Temple|Tulja Bhavani]] * [[Mahalakshmi Temple, Kolhapur|Mahalakshmi]] * ''[[:Category:Shakta pithas|More...]]''
|group6 = [[:en:Hindu texts|Texts]] |list6 = * [[:en:Devi Mahatmya|Devi Mahatmya]] * [[:en:Devi-Bhagavata Purana|Devi-Bhagavata Purana]] * [[:en:Kalika Purana|Kalika Purana]] * [[Shakta Upanishads]] **[[Sita Upanishad]] **[[Tripuratapini Upanishad]] **[[:en:Devi Upanishad|Devi Upanishad]] **[[Tripura Upanishad]] **[[:en:Bhavana Upanishad|Bhavana Upanishad]] **[[Saubhagyalakshmi Upanishad]] **[[Sarasvati-rahasya Upanishad]]
|group7 = Regional variations |list7 = * [[:en:Caribbean Shaktism|Caribbean Shaktism]]
|below = * [[:en:Hinduism|Hinduism]] * [[Tantra]] }}<noinclude> {{doc|content= {{collapsible option}} [[Category:Hindu denomination navigational boxes|Shaktism]] }} </noinclude>

|group2 = [[Matrikas]] |list2 = * [[:en:Brahmani|Brahmani]] * [[Maheshvari]] * [[:en:Kaumari|Kaumari]] * [[Vaishnavi (Matrika goddess)|Vaishnavi]] * [[Varahi]] * [[:en:Indrani (Matrika)|Indrani]] * [[:en:Chamunda|Chamunda]]
|group3 = [[Mahavidya]] |list3 = * [[:en:Kali|Kali]] * [[Tara (Mahavidya)|Tara]] * [[Tripura Sundari]] * [[:en:Bhuvaneshvari|Bhuvaneshvari]] * [[:en:Bhairavi|Bhairavi]] * [[:en:Chhinnamasta|Chhinnamasta]] * [[:en:Dhumavati|Dhumavati]] * [[:en:Bagalamukhi|Bagalamukhi]] * [[Matangi]] * [[:en:Kamalatmika|Kamalatmika]]
|group4 = [[Navadurga]] |list4 = * [[Shailaputri]] * [[:en:Brahmacharini|Brahmacharini]] * [[:en:Chandraghanta|Chandraghanta]] * [[:en:Kushmanda|Kushmanda]] * [[Skandamata]] * [[:en:Katyayani|Katyayani]] * [[:en:Kalaratri|Kalaratri]] * [[:en:Mahagauri|Mahagauri]] * [[Siddhidhatri]]
|group5 = [[Shakta pithas]] |list5 = * [[Vimala Temple|Bimala]] * [[:en:Kalighat Kali Temple|Kalighat]] * [[:en:Kamakhya Temple|Kamakhya]] * [[Taratarini Temple|Taratarini]] * [[Tulja Bhavani Temple|Tulja Bhavani]] * [[Mahalakshmi Temple, Kolhapur|Mahalakshmi]] * ''[[:Category:Shakta pithas|More...]]''

| above = * [[:en:History of Shaktism|History]]
|group1 = [[:en:Devi|Devi]] |list1 = * [[:en:Mahadevi|Mahadevi]] * [[Saraswati]] * [[:en:Lakshmi|Lakshmi]] * [[:en:Parvati|Parvati]] * [[:en:Sati (Hindu goddess)|Sati]] * [[Shakti]] * [[:en:Durga|Durga]] ** [[:en:Navadurga|Navadurga]] * [[:en:Mahakali|Mahakali]] * [[:en:Bhadrakali|Bhadrakali]] * [[:en:Radha|Radha]] * [[Sita]] * ''[[:Category:Hindu goddesses|More]]''
|group2 = [[:en:Matrikas|Matrikas]] |list2 = * [[:en:Brahmani|Brahmani]] * [[:en:Maheshvari|Maheshvari]] * [[:en:Kaumari|Kaumari]] * [[:en:Vaishnavi (Matrika goddess)|Vaishnavi]] * [[:en:Varahi|Varahi]] * [[:en:Indrani (Matrika)|Indrani]] * [[:en:Chamunda|Chamunda]]
|group3 = [[:en:Mahavidya|Mahavidya]] |list3 = * [[:en:Kali|Kali]] * [[:en:Tara (Mahavidya)|Tara]] * [[Tripura Sundari]] * [[:en:Bhuvaneshvari|Bhuvaneshvari]] * [[:en:Bhairavi|Bhairavi]] * [[:en:Chhinnamasta|Chhinnamasta]] * [[:en:Dhumavati|Dhumavati]] * [[:en:Bagalamukhi|Bagalamukhi]] * [[:en:Matangi|Matangi]] * [[:en:Kamalatmika|Kamalatmika]]
|group4 = [[:en:Navadurga|Navadurga]] |list4 = * [[:en:Shailaputri|Shailaputri]] * [[:en:Brahmacharini|Brahmacharini]] * [[:en:Chandraghanta|Chandraghanta]] * [[:en:Kushmanda|Kushmanda]] * [[:en:Skandamata|Skandamata]] * [[:en:Katyayani|Katyayani]] * [[:en:Kalaratri|Kalaratri]] * [[:en:Mahagauri|Mahagauri]] * [[Siddhidhatri]]
|group5 = [[Shakta pithas]] |list5 = * [[:en:Vimala Temple|Bimala]] * [[:en:Kalighat Kali Temple|Kalighat]] * [[:en:Kamakhya Temple|Kamakhya]] * [[:en:Taratarini Temple|Taratarini]] * [[Tulja Bhavani Temple|Tulja Bhavani]] * [[:en:Mahalakshmi Temple, Kolhapur|Mahalakshmi]] * ''[[:Category:Shakta pithas|More...]]''
